import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def get_user_role(user_id: str) -> str:
    user = db.fetch_user(user_id)
    if user is None:
        return "viewer"
    return user["role"]


def calculate_discount(customer_id: str, order_total: float) -> float:
    tier = get_customer_tier(customer_id)
    if tier is None:
        return 0.05
    if tier not in ("bronze", "silver", "gold", "platinum"):
        return 0.0
    return DISCOUNT_RATES[tier]


def get_config_value(key: str) -> str:
    try:
        value = config_store.get(key)
    except ConfigError:
        return "default_value"
    if value is None:
        return "default_value"
    return value


def resolve_tenant(request_host: str) -> str:
    tenant = tenant_registry.lookup(request_host)
    if tenant is None:
        return "default"
    if not tenant.is_active:
        return "default"
    return tenant.id
